name: LLaMA 7B
license: LLaMA Non-Commercial Research License (gated application access)
note: Smallest first-gen LLaMA, trained on roughly 1T tokens for efficient research use under a gated non-commercial license.
tpsNote: No verifiably-sourced LLaMA-1-7B-specific RTX 4090 llama.cpp benchmark was found; do not conflate with unrelated Llama-3/Mistral 7B figures circulating online.

results.notes: Reported by Meta in the Llama 2 model card's comparison table against Llama 1 models
Percent of generations rated both truthful and informative

verificationNotes: Confirmed real release, part of the same 2023-02-24 LLaMA drop. Wikipedia confirms 7B=6.7B params exactly, 2048 ctx, gated non-commercial license. Fetched the MODEL_CARD.md comparison table and confirmed MMLU 35.1, TruthfulQA 27.42, Toxigen 23.00 all appear for the Llama-1-7B row. No changes made.
